responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain scalable, high-performance software components across the full software development lifecycle
Implement efficient algorithms and data structures to solve complex computational problems at production scale
Conduct thorough code reviews to enforce coding standards, security practices, and architectural consistency across the team
Write comprehensive unit, integration, and regression tests to ensure software correctness and prevent regressions
Debug and resolve production incidents by performing systematic root cause analysis and deploying targeted hotfixes
Collaborate with product managers and cross-functional stakeholders to translate business requirements into technical specifications
Design RESTful APIs and service interfaces that are backward-compatible, versioned, and well-documented
Optimize existing codebases for latency, throughput, and memory efficiency using profiling tools and benchmarking
Participate in system design discussions to define scalable, fault-tolerant architectures for new product features
Maintain and improve CI/CD pipelines to accelerate delivery velocity and ensure reliable automated deployments
